# ship

Equivalent quick commands: `/ck:ship`, `/ck:release`.
Equivalent skill shorthands: `$ck-ship`, `$ck-release`.

Use the `command-router` alias logic, then route to these canonical skills:
- $release-readiness

Related agents:
- release_manager
- reliability_engineer

Related scripts:
- (none)

Typical artifacts touched:
- docs/release-checklist.md
- runbooks/release-rollout.md
- runbooks/rollback.md

Instructions:
- preserve any payload after the alias and pass it into the resolved workflow
- read `docs/project-context/index.md` and `AGENTS.md` before risky work
- keep the result architecture-safe and proportional to the change class
- note: Use before deploy, merge trains, or release freezes. Pair with /ck:migrate or /ck:obs when relevant.

Output format:
# Resolved command
## Canonical workflow
## Next artifact or command
## Key risks or assumptions
